_comment: THE single machine-readable source of truth for Mental's supported platform matrix. Every consumer — core/build.gradle.kts task registration + plugin.yml api-version, scripts/integration-matrix.sh, .github/workflows/{build,release}.yml, the release-notes range — reads this file (jq / JsonSlurper). No Minecraft version or JDK literal may live anywhere else. Folia (platform: folia) is added by Phase 5 Task 5.6; until then this matrix is paper-only.

ocm._comment: The pinned kernitus OldCombatMechanics release the coexistence gate stages. CI (stageOcmJar) downloads url, verifies sha256, and stages to run/ocm-jar/OldCombatMechanics.jar. A locally-present jar there (e.g. a fork build) overrides the download.
